title: Diagnose Commons server issues and fix all bugs

Done. Here's the summary of findings and fixes:

---

**Port status:** Both `:8090` (commons-server) and `:8110` (audition server) are running fine. Bug 1 (personas not appearing) is not actually broken — `firstServerSync` works as intended since the server IS up and sending ticks.

**Bug 3 (glow corrupting trees) — FIXED:**
